title: AI Low Poly 3D
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into stylized low-poly 3D art.
positive_prompt: Stylized low poly 3D portrait, clean geometric shapes, modern game art style, beautifully optimized polygonal design, vibrant depth and lighting, recognizable facial features, professional 3D render, smooth composition, artistic low-poly aesthetic, highly detailed geometry, premium digital artwork, sharp edges, contemporary design, visually striking portrait
negative_prompt: photorealistic, blurry, low quality, noisy render, distorted geometry, broken mesh, deformed face, extra eyes, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, poor lighting, rendering artifacts, stretched polygons, pixelated, unfinished model
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. game character render, colorful facets...
